reportSummary: Navigation labels are clear and most clicks reliably load the matching pages (sports sections, Today/Tomorrow CTAs, and prediction-type tabs). However, an interstitial (google_vignette) hijacked initial header clicks, adding needless friction, and ad tech noise is heavy. Primary CTAs respond as expected, but unlabeled links make basic actions like going “home” ambiguous. Accessibility is severely broken (critical missing alts, poor contrast, missing landmarks), undermining basic usability.
